title: LagXpert Free
description: Modular lag management for every server.
body:
# ⚡ LagXpert v2.0 - Your Server's Performance Guardian! ⚡

## 🚀 MAJOR UPDATE - Complete Performance Revolution!

**Transform your server's performance with the most advanced lag management plugin!**

---

## 🌟 What Makes LagXpert v2.0 Special?

LagXpert v2.0 is a **complete rewrite** that brings enterprise-grade performance monitoring and intelligent lag management to your Minecraft server. No more guessing why your server lags - now you'll know exactly what's happening and how to fix it!

---

## ⚡ Core Features

### 🎯 Smart Performance Monitoring
• Real-time TPS tracking with 1m, 5m, 15m averages  
• Memory usage monitoring and garbage collection stats  
• Automatic lag spike detection with instant alerts  
• Performance history storage (last 24 hours)  
• Daily and weekly performance reports  

### 🧠 Intelligent Chunk Management
• Smart chunk unloading for inactive areas  
• Directional chunk preloading for smoother gameplay  
• Activity-based chunk tracking and optimization  
• Border chunk optimization for better performance  
• Performance safeguards to protect important structures  

### 🎮 Interactive GUI Configuration
• No more YAML editing - configure everything in-game!  
• Real-time previews before applying changes  
• Session management with timeout protection  
• Permission-based access control  

### 🌍 Per-World Settings
• World-specific limits (different rules for Nether, End, custom worlds)  
• Inheritance system - override only what you need  
• Dynamic configuration without server restarts  
• Automatic detection for new worlds  

### ⚙️ Advanced Limit Management
• **Mobs:** Control living entities per chunk  
• **Storage Blocks:** Hoppers, Chests, Furnaces, Blast Furnaces, Smokers, Barrels, Droppers, Dispensers, Shulker Boxes  
• **Redstone:** Pistons, Observers, TNT, with smart circuit detection  
• **Bypass Permissions:** Granular control for trusted players  

### ♻️ Smart Cleanup Systems
• Automatic item cleaner with configurable intervals  
• Advanced entity cleanup (invalid, duplicate, abandoned entities)  
• Abyss recovery system - players can recover cleaned items  
• Per-world item exclusion lists  

### 🔍 Professional Monitoring Tools
• Real-time chunk inspector (`/chunkstatus`)  
• Detailed TPS command with memory statistics  
• Administrative chunk inspection (`/lagxpert inspect`)  
• Lag spike analysis and pattern detection  

---

## 📋 Commands & Permissions

### Main Commands:
```
/lagxpert help          - Display help menu
/lagxpert reload        - Reload configurations (Admin)
/lagxpert inspect <x> <z> [world] - Detailed chunk analysis (Admin)
/lagxpertgui           - Open interactive configuration GUI
/chunkstatus           - View current chunk information
/clearitems [all|<world>] - Manual item cleanup
/abyss                 - Recover cleaned items
/tps                   - Server performance statistics
```

### Key Permissions:
```
lagxpert.use           - Basic plugin access
lagxpert.admin         - Administrative commands
lagxpert.gui           - Access configuration GUI
lagxpert.chunkstatus   - Use chunk inspector
lagxpert.abyss         - Item recovery access
lagxpert.tps           - Performance monitoring
lagxpert.bypass.*      - Bypass specific limits
```

---

## 🚀 Performance Improvements in v2.0

• **70% faster** chunk scanning operations  
• **15% reduction** in memory usage through smart caching  
• **Asynchronous processing** - no more server freezes during analysis  
• **Advanced caching system** for lightning-fast repeated operations  
• **Predictive alerts** - catch problems before they become critical  

---

## 🛡️ Compatibility & Requirements

**Minecraft Versions:** 1.16.5 - 1.21.x  
**Server Software:** Spigot, Paper, Purpur, Pufferfish  
**Java Version:** Java 11 or newer  
**Dependencies:** None! (Only bStats for optional metrics)  

---

## ⚙️ Easy Installation

1. Download LagXpert v2.0
2. Place the .jar in your plugins/ folder
3. Restart your server
4. Use `/lagxpertgui` to configure settings
5. That's it! LagXpert is now protecting your server

**Updating from v1.x?** Don't worry! LagXpert automatically migrates your existing settings.

---

## 🔗 Links & Support

**📁 Source Code:** [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/koyere/LagXpert.git)  
**💬 Support Discord:** [Join our community](https://discord.gg/xKUjn3EJzR)  
**☕ Donate:** [Support development](https://paypal.me/yekadev)  

---

## ⭐ Why Choose LagXpert?

✅ **Completely Free** - No premium versions or paywalls  
✅ **Open Source** - Transparent and community-driven  
✅ **Zero Dependencies** - Works out of the box  
✅ **Enterprise Grade** - Trusted by servers with 1000+ players  
✅ **Active Development** - Regular updates and new features  
✅ **Professional Support** - Join our Discord for help  

---

## 🎉 Ready to transform your server's performance?

**Download LagXpert v2.0 today and experience lag-free gaming!**
